questions.question: What is the sequence of ball colors released in this puzzle?
questions.expected_answer: 1 blue, 1 red, then all remaining blue
hints: First blue flips latch and triggers red

questions.question: What does the latch flip do to the path of subsequent balls?
questions.expected_answer: It changes the path so all subsequent balls go to the left lever (blue)
hints: After flipping, balls are routed to left side

questions.question: How is the second blue ball triggered after the red ball?
questions.expected_answer: The red ball itself triggers the second blue ball release
hints: The red ball goes to the left lever

questions.question: Trace the state of the gear bits and ball colors through the sequence
questions.expected_answer: Start: GB1=right,GB2=right; Ball 1 (blue): latch flips, triggers red; Ball 2 (red): goes to left lever, triggers blue; Ball 3+: all blue (latch remains flipped)
hints: Latch keeps subsequent balls as blue
